item.name: Unbound Relic
entries: While attuned, you can cast {@spell magic missile|phb} and are permanently resistant to cold.
The relic has a maximum number of charges and regains them when you finish a long rest.
You gain a +2 bonus to AC.
You can use this item as a reaction to absorb energy.

item.name: Mana Crystal Prototype
entries: The prototype has a number of charges and regains all its expended charges after a long rest.
When expended, each charge produces one point of energy.

item.name: Mana Crystal
entries: This item is granted by a class feature grant path.

item.name: Dead Battery
entries: The battery regains all charges after a long rest.
All charges are restored when you finish a long rest.

item.name: Burnt Generator
entries: The generator has 4 charges, regaining all spent uses at the end of a long rest.

item.name: Cursed Fang
entries: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls while wielding this relic.
You have immunity to the poisoned condition while wielding this relic.

classFeature.name: Spellcasting
entries: At 1st level, you learn {@spell magic missile|phb} and {@spell cure wounds|phb}.

classFeature.name: Mana Crystal
entries: At 1st level, you gain a mana crystal.
